exercises.title: Judging Accuracy
exercises.content: A ruler measures a desk as 120 cm. The true length is 119 cm. Is this measurement accurate? Why or why not?
hints: Is 1 cm close enough to be 'accurate'?

exercises.title: Know the True Value
exercises.content: Can you judge if a measurement is accurate if you DON'T know the true value? Explain.
hints: You need something to compare to
Without the true value, what can you compare?
